# Salon Central

> Salon Central is an all-in-one hair and beauty salon management software in Pakistan with POS, appointment booking, CRM, invoicing, inventory, payroll, and WhatsApp automation.

Salon Central helps beauty salons, hair salons, and spas in Pakistan run their entire business from one dashboard: bookings, staff, clients, point of sale, inventory, payroll, and automated WhatsApp communication.

## Features

- [Appointment Scheduling & Booking Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/appointment-scheduling): Manage bookings, scheduling, online appointments, staff calendars, and client reminders from one platform.
- [Client Management Software & CRM](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/client-management): Manage customer profiles, visit history, appointments, invoices, loyalty, and CRM from one platform.
- [Inventory Management Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/inventory-management): Track stock levels, set low-stock alerts, auto-deduct products on POS sales, and manage retail pricing.
- [Accounting Software for Salon Invoicing](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/invoicing): Create branded, auto-numbered invoices, apply discounts, mark payments, and export as PDF.
- [Loyalty Points Program](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/loyalty-points): Loyalty points calculator, client rewards, redeemable discounts, membership tiers, and digital loyalty cards.
- [Online Booking Page](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/online-booking): A branded booking page clients can access from Instagram, WhatsApp, or Google Maps, with appointments landing directly in the dashboard.
- [Payroll Software for Salons](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/payroll-management): Manage staff salaries, commissions, payouts, attendance, and payroll reports.
- [Salon POS Software & Point of Sale System](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/pos): A complete point of sale system with invoicing, inventory, and CRM built in.
- [Revenue Management Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/revenue-management): Track daily revenue, average ticket, payment method breakdown, top services, and one-click PDF reports.
- [Staff Management Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/staff-management): Manage roles, service assignments, performance stats, and team revenue tracking.
- [WhatsApp Marketing & Automated Reminders](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/features/whatsapp-reminders): Automated booking confirmations, appointment reminders, follow-ups, birthday messages, and low-stock alerts.

## Solutions

- [Hair Salon POS & Booking Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/solutions/hair-salon): Hair salon POS software with appointment scheduling, hair formula tracking, AI virtual try-on, and WhatsApp automation.
- [Beauty Salon POS & Management Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/solutions/beauty-salon): Beauty salon POS software with appointment scheduling, detailed beauty client profiles, loyalty tiers, and WhatsApp automation.
- [Spa POS & Booking Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/solutions/spa): Spa POS software with appointment scheduling, multi-branch support, loyalty tiers, and WhatsApp automation.
- [Nail Salon POS & Booking Software](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/solutions/nail-salon): Nail salon software with appointment scheduling, nail preference tracking, POS checkout, and WhatsApp automation.

## Comparisons

- [Salon Central vs Blusha](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-blusha): A feature-by-feature comparison with Blusha, another salon-specific platform with WhatsApp automation and loyalty tools.
- [Salon Central vs Websol](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-websol): How Salon Central compares to Websol, a general POS/ERP system for retail, restaurants, and pharmacies.
- [Salon Central vs Hulm](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-hulm): How Salon Central compares to Hulm, a general business operations platform for retail and restaurants.
- [Salon Central vs Asaan POS](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-asaan-pos): Asaan POS has been discontinued and is not available for new customers.
- [Salon Central vs OneClick](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-oneclick): How Salon Central compares to OneClick, a general FBR-integrated retail POS system.
- [Salon Central vs Oscar](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-oscar): How Salon Central compares to Oscar, a general multi-industry POS platform.
- [Salon Central vs eHisabKitab](https://www.saloncentral.xyz/compare/salon-central-vs-ehisabkitab): How Salon Central compares to eHisabKitab, an FBR-compliant multi-industry POS, inventory, accounting, and HRM platform.
